translation_text: Colour's five hues from the eyes their sight will take;
translation_text_raw: Colour's five hues from the eyes their sight will take;

translation_text: Music's five notes the ears as deaf can make;
translation_text_raw: Music's five notes the ears as deaf can make;

translation_text: The flavours five deprive the mouth of taste;
translation_text_raw: The flavours five deprive the mouth of taste;

translation_text: The chariot course, and the wild hunting waste Make mad the mind; and objects rare and strange,
translation_text_raw: The chariot course, and the wild hunting waste Make mad the mind; and objects rare and strange,

chinese_text: 難得之貨令人行妨。是以聖人為腹不為目，
translation_text: Sought for, men's conduct will to evil change. Therefore the sage seeks to satisfy (the craving of) the belly, and not the (insatiable longing of the) eyes.
translation_text_raw: Sought for, men's conduct will to evil change. Therefore the sage seeks to satisfy (the craving of) the belly, and not the (insatiable longing of the) eyes.

translation_text: He puts from him the latter, and prefers to seek the former.
translation_text_raw: He puts from him the latter, and prefers to seek the former.
